## Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Hardware Configuration
- **ESP32 Model:** [e.g., Seeed XIAO ESP32-S3]
- **RAK Module:** [e.g., RAK4631 on RAK19001]
- **Firmware Version:** [e.g., 1.0.0]
- **Browser:** [e.g., Chrome 120]

## Serial Console Output
```
Paste relevant serial console output here
```

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.

## Checklist
- [ ] I have checked existing issues for duplicates
- [ ] I have tested with the latest firmware version
- [ ] I have included serial console output
- [ ] I have included steps to reproduce
